// ABOUT: Black + Ruff auto-formatting for Python files
// USAGE: Copy the PostToolUse section into your settings.json hooks
// REQUIRES: black and ruff installed (uv add --dev black ruff)

PostToolUse.// DESCRIPTION: Format Python files with Black and fix with Ruff

hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

// ALTERNATIVE_UV: If using uv, prefix commands with 'uv run'

hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path') && uv run black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
